---
name: anki-decks
description: Execute apy CLI via script to list Anki decks. Generates/runs shell commands, formats as tables.
---

# Anki Apy List Decks Skill

## When to Use
/list-anki-decks or "show Anki decks".

## Workflow
1. Use `./list-anki-decks.sh` script.
2. Pipe to awk/sed for table format.
3. Example: shell(./list-anki-decks.sh)

## Script Usage
./list-anki-decks.sh
